rationale: No textual or operational conflict. The homestead exemption increase affects property tax revenue, not the armed security officer mandate. Even indirect fiscal pressure is already contemplated by the good cause exception for funding availability in Subsection (c)(1).
quote:
If the board of trustees of a school district is unable to comply with this section, the board may claim a good cause exception from the requirement to comply with this section if the district's noncompliance is due to the availability of:
(1) funding; or
_note: No direct conflict between Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase and Educ. Code §37.0814 armed security officer requirement. Indirect fiscal impact on school district funding is mitigated by the statute's existing good cause exception for funding availability.
